## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change, and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation only

## Testing

<!-- How did you verify the change works? -->

- [ ] Tested locally with a non-empty database
- [ ] SQL schema changes include a migration note in `sql/migrations/`
- [ ] Python files pass `python3 -m py_compile`
- [ ] No new hardcoded user paths or secrets

## Checklist

- [ ] Commit message follows conventional format (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, etc.)
- [ ] Touched files are within a single topic
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] Updated relevant docs (`docs/`, README, inline comments)

## Screenshots

<!-- If the PR changes the GUI, drop a before/after screenshot -->
